zh.lifeSummary: 當Susanna Page於大約1622年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉文哈姆時，她的父親Thomas Page30歲，母親Susanna Payne39歲。她於1636年4月與Thomas Gleason III在英國諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1691年1月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓享年70歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susanna Page于大约1622年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可拉文哈姆时，她的父亲Thomas Page30岁，母亲Susanna Payne39岁。她于1636年4月与Thomas Gleason III在英国諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1691年1月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓享年70岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Page
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and French: occupational or status name for a young servant, Middle English page, paige, Old French page (from Italian paggio, ultimately from Greek paidion, a diminutive of pais ‘boy, child’). The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lepage .
French Canadian (Pagé): altered form of French Paget , a diminutive of 1. Compare Pashia .
North German: metonymic occupational name for a horse dealer, from Middle Low German page ‘horse’.

variants.name: Pages
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Mario, Eduardo, Jorge, Luis, Mauricio, Ramon, Fernando, Jose, Lazaro, Pedro, Alfredo.  French Jacques, Lucien, Michel.

Catalan and southern French (Pagès): occupational name for a peasant farmer or agricultural laborer, from Catalan and Old Occitan pagès ‘peasant’ (from Late Latin pagensis, a derivative of pagus ‘village, country district’).
English: variant of Page with genitival of post-medieval excrescent s.

variants.name: Paget
meanings: French: diminutive of   Page  .
English: variant of   Padgett  .

variants.name: Paige
meanings: English (mainly Devon): variant of   Page  .

variants.name: Pageau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Stephane, Alphonse, Andre, Fernand, Gisele, Jean Claude, Lucien, Philippe.
French: diminutive of   Page  .

variants.name: Lepage
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Andre, Fernand, Pierre, Raoul, Adelard, Alcide, Christophe, Lucien, Normand, Adrien.
French: occupational or status name for a young servant, a variant of Page 1, with fused masculine definite article le. Compare Lapage .
French Canadian: altered form of Pagé (see Page 2).

variants.name: Padgett
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire): from a Middle English diminutive of page, paige ‘servant, groom’ (see Page ).

variants.name: Littlepage
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English littel ‘small’ +Middle English, Old French page ‘young servant’ (see Page ).

variants.name: Pashia
meanings: Americanized form of French Canadian Pagé (see Page 2).
History: It was Jean Baptiste Pagé from QC whose surname was changed to Pashia after he settled in MO in the 1810s. Some of his descendants bear a rare variant, Pashea.

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzannah
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Susana
meanings: From Hebrew. See Susanna .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Susanna Page was born about 1622, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Page, was 30 and her mother, Susanna Payne, was 39. She married Thomas Gleason III in April 1636, in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 24 January 1691, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 70, and was buried in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susanna Page est née environ 1622, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Page, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Susanna Payne, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Gleason III en avril 1636, à Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 janvier 1691, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susanna Page um 1622 in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Page 30 und ihre Mutter Susanna Payne 39. Sie hat im April 1636 in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England Thomas Gleason III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Januar 1691 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Page è nata il circa 1622 nel Lavenham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Page, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Susanna Payne, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Gleason III nel aprile 1636, nel Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 24 gennaio 1691, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Susanna Pageが約1622年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラベンハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Pageは30歳，母Susanna Payneは39歳であった。1636年4月にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスルグラブでThomas Gleason IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1691年1月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンで70歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Susanna Page(이)가 대략 1622년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레이븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Page(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susanna Payne(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1636년 4월 영국 노르섬프토실르 설그레이브에서 Thomas Gleason III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1691년 1월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Page nasceu aproximadamente 1622, em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Page, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Payne, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Gleason III em abril de 1636, em Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de janeiro de 1691, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susanna Page родилась около 1622 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Page было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna Payne, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Gleason III апрель 1636 г. в местности сулграв, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 24 января 1691 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susanna Page nació aproximadamente 1622, en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Page, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Susanna Payne, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Thomas Gleason III en abril de 1636, en Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 24 de enero de 1691, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
